textbox.text: I remembered the ratings for the same faces, and when the same face popped up but with different hair or changed parts the hair style influenced me in the J or K rating. To me non-binary people are more controversal, either less or more attractive than gender-conforming in general. Also they eyes influenced the attractiveness score.
